source: Open Food Facts (https://world.openfoodfacts.org), ODbL. Real product nutrition values used as ground truth for panel-parser accuracy scoring.
note: Ground-truth per-100g / per-serve macros for real products. The panel text is rendered from these values by the accuracy test (device OCR cannot run in host tests); productUrl points to the real label image for on-device evaluation.
